evals.prompt: Generate a DV testplan for the APB UART block. Use the S1 JSON at /Users/apple/Documents/DV-Skills/skills/dv-testplan/evals/test_inputs/apb_uart_spec_summary.json. Project name is apb_uart, IP name is UART. For cross coverage, include: baud_divisor × data_bits, parity_mode × stop_bits. Save output to /Users/apple/Documents/DV-Skills/skills/dv-testplan/evals/workspace/iteration-1/eval-1-apb-uart-testplan/with_skill/outputs/
evals.expected_output: testplan.xlsx with 2 sheets: Summary and Testplan. Testplan must have 11 columns. All 6 APB UART features (APB interface, TX, RX, baud rate, flow control, interrupts) must appear. Random tests must end in _rand_test. Checker IDs follow CHK_UART_<FEATURE>_<TYPE>_<NNN> format. At least 2 cross coverpoint rows added. Negative tests have parent feature linked. DV-I/DV-C/DV-F milestone column populated. Summary sheet shows totals.

assertions.text: testplan.xlsx is created in the output directory
Excel has 2 sheets named Summary and Testplan
Testplan sheet has exactly 11 columns matching the defined schema
All 6 features from spec appear in testplan rows
Random test names end with _rand_test
Checker IDs follow CHK_UART_<FEATURE>_<TYPE>_<NNN> format
Negative/error rows have [NEG] prefix and Parent Feature populated
At least 2 cross coverpoint rows present
Milestone column populated for all rows (DV-I/DV-C/DV-F)
Summary sheet contains total test count, milestone breakdown, checker counts

evals.prompt: Run /dv-testplan on the raw AXI DMA spec file at /Users/apple/Documents/DV-Skills/skills/dv-spec-parse/evals/test_specs/axi_dma_spec.md without using an S1 JSON. Project: axi_dma, IP name: DMA. Skip cross coverage (type SKIP when asked). Save output to /Users/apple/Documents/DV-Skills/skills/dv-testplan/evals/workspace/iteration-1/eval-2-axi-dma-testplan/with_skill/outputs/
evals.expected_output: Skill must parse the raw spec file directly (no S1 JSON), notify the user it parsed directly, and generate testplan.xlsx. Since DMA has a state machine (Idle/Active/Error), FSM transition coverpoints must appear. No cross coverage rows since user chose SKIP. AXI4 protocol compliance tests should appear. Both aclk and pclk domains implied — reset sequence test should be DV-I.

assertions.text: testplan.xlsx created from raw spec file without S1 JSON
Skill informed user it parsed directly from raw spec
FSM transition coverpoints present (Idle->Active->Error states)
No cross coverage rows (user chose SKIP)
AXI4 protocol compliance tests present
11 columns present in Testplan sheet
Summary sheet present with counts

evals.prompt: I want to generate a testplan but I haven't provided a spec yet. Project is i2c_controller.
evals.expected_output: Skill must detect missing SPEC_SOURCE and ask for it in a single message before doing anything. Must not generate any files.

assertions.text: Skill asks for the missing spec source (S1 JSON or raw spec) before proceeding
No testplan.xlsx generated without the spec
Skill does not re-ask for project name which was already given
